# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "appDisplayName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('cicd-sp-', uniqueString(subscription().id, resourceGroup().id))]"
    },
    "password": {
      "type": "secureString"
    },
    "startDate": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2020-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    },
    "endDate": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2099-12-31T23:59:59Z"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "contributorRoleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]",
    "appUri": "[concat('api://', uniqueString(subscription().id, parameters('appDisplayName')))]",
    "roleAssignmentGuid": "[guid(subscription().id, parameters('appDisplayName'), 'contributor')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Graph/applications",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-13",
      "name": "[uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id)]",
      "properties": {
        "displayName": "[parameters('appDisplayName')]",
        "signInAudience": "AzureADMyOrg",
        "identifierUris": [
          "[variables('appUri')]"
        ],
        "api": {
          "requestedAccessTokenVersion": 2
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Graph/servicePrincipals",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-13",
      "name": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/applications', uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id)), '2023-04-13').appId]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/applications', uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "appId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/applications', uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id)), '2023-04-13').appId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Graph/applications/passwords",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-13",
      "name": "[concat(uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id), '/cicd-secret')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/applications', uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "passwordCredential": {
          "displayName": "cicd-secret",
          "startDateTime": "[parameters('startDate')]",
          "endDateTime": "[parameters('endDate')]",
          "secretText": "[parameters('password')]"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('roleAssignmentGuid')]",
      "scope": "[subscription().id]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/servicePrincipals', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/applications', uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id)), '2023-04-13').appId)]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/servicePrincipals', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/applications', uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id)), '2023-04-13').appId), '2023-04-13').id]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[subscription().tenantId]"
    },
    "subscriptionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[subscription().subscriptionId]"
    },
    "appId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/applications', uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id)), '2023-04-13').appId]"
    },
    "servicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/servicePrincipals', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Graph/applications', uniqueString(parameters('appDisplayName'), subscription().id)), '2023-04-13').appId), '2023-04-13').id]"
    }
  }
}
